mapper.sql: SELECT r.id, r.member_id, r.gym_id, r.reason, r.status, r.assigned_to, r.memo, r.scheduled_at, r.resolved_at, r.created_at, up.name AS member_name, up.contact AS member_phone, up.tier AS tier, cu.name AS assigned_to_name, me.end_date AS membership_end, (SELECT p.name FROM membership ms2 JOIN product p ON p.id = ms2.product_id WHERE ms2.user_id = r.member_id ORDER BY ms2.end_date DESC LIMIT 1) AS product_name FROM crm_re_registration r LEFT JOIN user_profiles up ON up.user_id = r.member_id LEFT JOIN crm_users cu ON cu.id = r.assigned_to LEFT JOIN ( SELECT user_id, MAX(end_date) AS end_date FROM membership GROUP BY user_id ) me ON me.user_id = r.member_id
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS target, SUM(CASE WHEN me.end_date >= CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed, SUM(CASE WHEN me.end_date IS NULL OR me.end_date < CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS expired FROM crm_re_registration r LEFT JOIN ( SELECT user_id, MAX(end_date) AS end_date FROM membership GROUP BY user_id ) me ON me.user_id = r.member_id WHERE r.gym_id = #{gymId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO crm_re_registration (id, member_id, gym_id, reason, status, assigned_to, memo, scheduled_at, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{memberId}, #{gymId}, #{reason}, #{status}, #{assignedTo}, #{memo}, #{scheduledAt}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE crm_re_registration SET status = #{status}, resolved_at = CASE WHEN #{status} IN ('success','failed') THEN NOW() ELSE resolved_at END WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE crm_re_registration SET memo = #{memo} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE crm_re_registration SET assigned_to = #{assignedTo}, status = CASE WHEN status = 'pending' THEN 'in_progress' ELSE status END WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM crm_re_registration WHERE gym_id = #{gymId} AND status = #{status}
